TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Carrier and Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Claims files (derived) 

VALUES: $ 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the sum of all CLM_PMT_AMT from the Carrier and DME claims.
